div1.entryFree: Suppliant, subst. an humble petitioner (dissyll. also in the middle of the line): Lucr. 897. All's V, 3, 134. R2 V, 3, 75. R3 I, 2, 207. Cor. III, 1, 44. Tit. IV, 3, 117. With for: when she for thy repeal was s. Gent. III, 1, 234. heard ye not what an humble s. Lord Hastings was to her for his delivery? R3 I, 1, 74.
